title: Calendar view duplication
excerpt: I use calendar view a lot for my workforce, I would like to be able to duplicate a task on the calendar.  For example being able to click right on the task and having an option to duplicate and then I can edit it from th…

posts.author: Ness (Vanessa Freeman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use calendar view a lot for my workforce, I would like to be able to duplicate a task on the calendar. For example being able to click right on the task and having an option to duplicate and then I can edit it from there.

I use this for example if I have given a customer three different dates to visit and I am waiting for them to confirm and I can then just click right duplicate and then amend the date.

At the moment I have to leave calendar view, go to the main table then search for the task and then duplicate.

This would be a great help for me. Thank you

posts.author: sdimbert (Seth)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree that this would be a great feature.

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Ness, We actually built a calendar app for Monday called MasterPlan Calendar that makes this kind of workflow much easier. You can duplicate tasks directly from the calendar view and then just adjust the date, no need to jump back to the main table. It also has a bunch of other features beyond the native calendar that help with scheduling and planning.

Here’s the link if you want to take a look: https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000472/masterplan-calendar

posts.author: ava951robinson (ava robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It would be super helpful to have a “Duplicate” option when right-clicking a task in calendar view. I often offer clients multiple dates and need to quickly copy the same task across different days. Right now, I have to leave the calendar, find the task, and duplicate it from there.
